list.value: author_authority:{0} AND search.resourcetype:Item AND -entityType_keyword:Fonds AND -entityType_keyword:JournalFonds AND -entityType_keyword:Aggregation
dc.relation.place_authority:{0} OR dc.coverage.spatialpvcs_authority:{0} OR dc.coverage.spatialpvcr_authority:{0} OR dc.coverage.spatialpvcn_authority:{0} OR dc.coverage.spatialpvcc_authority:{0}
search.resourcetype:Item AND entityType_keyword:Fonds AND -glamfonds.parent:* AND glam.entity.enabled:true
search.resourcetype:Item AND entityType_keyword:JournalFonds AND -glamjournalfond.parent:* AND glam.entity.enabled:true
search.resourcetype:Item AND (entityType_keyword:Publication OR entityType_keyword:Patent OR entityType_keyword:Product)
